change: Config accessor methods are now internal and require feature flags to access
before: let mut c = zenoh::Config::default(); c.set_mode(zenoh::config::WhatAmI::Client);
after: Requires zenoh = { version = "1.0.0", features = ["internal", "internal_config"] } to access config internals
source: the access to `Config` elements is internal now, add this to migration guide

change: Storage backend serialization format changed for filesystem and rocksdb backends; existing stored data is incompatible
before: Old serialization format used by zenoh-backend-filesystem and zenoh-backend-rocksdb
after: New serialization format; migration tool required to read old data
source: migration from old to new serialization format for storage backends

change: Default listen endpoints changed; peer-mode sessions now always listen on tcp/[::]:0 by default
before: Peer-mode sessions did not need to specify listen endpoints
after: endpoints: { router: ["tcp/[::]:7447"], peer: ["tcp/[::]:0"] } is forced by default; users without TCP must explicitly override
source: The default endpoints to listen on

change: SourceInfo changed from a pair of optional id and sn to an Option type
before: SourceInfo represented as a pair of optional id and optional sequence number
after: SourceInfo is an Option instead of a pair of optionals
source: Turn source info into option instead of a pair of optional id and sn

change: Congestion control config value renamed from 'blockfirst' to 'block_first' (snake_case consistency fix)
before: congestion_control: "blockfirst"
after: congestion_control: "block_first"
source: fix: consistently use the snake case

change: Reply::replier_id() now returns EntityGlobalId instead of ZenohId
before: Reply::replier_id() -> ZenohId
after: Reply::replier_id() -> EntityGlobalId

change: Downsampling interceptor config format changed; now accepts a list of flows and supports 'query', 'reply', 'push' message type filters
before: Downsampling config accepted a single flow; only supported publication (push) message type
after: Downsampling config accepts a list of flows; message types are 'push', 'query', 'reply'
source: [ZEN-520] Add support for query/reply messages to Downsampling

change: SHM metadata format changed; SHM backward compatibility broken
before: SHM metadata stored in separate fields identified by multiple descriptors
after: Combined SHM metadata in single storage identified by single descriptor; incompatible with previous SHM format

change: REST plugin no longer enabled by default for zenohd; must be explicitly configured
before: REST plugin enabled by default when running zenohd
after: REST plugin only enabled if --rest-http-port flag is passed or configured in config file
source: chore: enable rest plugin only if in config or if --rest-http-port is set

change: Link selection metadata field names abbreviated in wire format
before: Full names 'priorities' and 'reliability' used in link selection metadata
after: Abbreviated names 'prio' and 'rel' used; values '0'/'1' used for best_effort/reliable reliability

change: FifoChannel recv methods now return ZResult<Option<T>> instead of ZResult<T>
before: FifoChannel (try)recv{,_deadline,_timeout} returned ZResult<T>; disconnect/empty errors via error type
after: FifoChannel (try)recv{,_deadline,_timeout} return ZResult<Option<T>>; None indicates disconnected/empty/timeout

change: Encoding and timestamp serialization removed from zenoh-ext
before: Encoding and timestamp serialization available in zenoh-ext
after: Encoding and timestamp serialization moved out of zenoh-ext
source: Encoding and timestamp serialization remove from zenoh-ext

change: flume::Receiver no longer exposed in public API; replaced with opaque handler type
before: FifoChannel handler exposed full flume::Receiver API
after: flume::Receiver encapsulated; only zenoh-defined API surface exposed

change: TLS configuration parameter names renamed
before: server_certificate, server_private_key, client_certificate, client_private_key, server_name_verification, client_auth
after: listen_certificate, listen_private_key, connect_certificate, connect_private_key, verify_name_on_connect, enable_mtls
source: feat!: renaming of TLS configuration parameters

change: Serialization API moved from zenoh core into zenoh-ext
before: Serialization helpers available in core zenoh crate
after: Serialization moved into zenoh-ext; code using old location must be updated to use zenoh-ext

change: TimeRange struct fields aligned to std::ops::Range format
before: TimeRange struct used custom field format
after: TimeRange struct fields match std::ops::Range<T> format

change: zenoh::session::EntityId made unstable
before: EntityId was a stable public API in zenoh::session
after: EntityId is unstable; ZenohId is stable

change: SourceInfo now uses accessor pattern instead of direct field access
before: SourceInfo fields accessed directly
after: SourceInfo fields accessed via accessor methods

change: Selector now uses accessor pattern instead of direct field access
before: Selector fields accessed directly
after: Selector fields accessed via accessor methods

change: zenoh_config internals hidden; zenoh::config public surface reduced significantly
before: zenoh::config exposed many internal types including ModeDependentValue and full zenoh_config API
after: zenoh::config only exposes Config, InsertionError, LookupError, LookupGuard, WhatAmI, WhatAmIMatcher, Notifier, Notification; zenoh::Config replaced by zenoh::config::Config

change: Replication feature removed from storage-manager plugin
before: Storage manager included a replication implementation
after: Replication implementation removed; feature unavailable until rewrite

change: Callback type changed to opaque type; no longer directly constructible from closures in the same way
before: Callback was a transparent/concrete type wrapping a closure
after: Callback is an opaque type
source: feat!: make callback an opaque type

change: Builder traits (QoSBuilderTrait, SampleBuilderTrait, etc.) made internal; no longer importable by users
before: Builder traits like QoSBuilderTrait and SampleBuilderTrait were public and required explicit imports
after: Builder traits are internal; corresponding methods generated directly on builder structs via macro

change: SHM buffer traits now have a generic parameter for the underlying type; Typed wrapper added
before: SHM buffer traits had no generic type parameter
after: SHM buffer traits are generic over underlying type; Typed<T> wrapper provides safe typed access

change: SHM ProtocolID hidden from public API; ShmProvider builder APIs simplified
before: ProtocolID was a public type in the SHM API; ShmProvider builder was more complex
after: ProtocolID is hidden; ShmProvider builder APIs simplified
source: SHM API improvement: ProtocolID and others...

change: Namespace prefix support added, causing API changes across bindings
before: No namespace prefix concept in session/key expression APIs
after: Namespace prefix supported; API changes required in zenoh-c, zenoh-cpp, zenoh-plugin-dds, zenoh-plugin-ros2dds

change: Minimum required Rust toolchain bumped to 1.85
before: Rust toolchain < 1.85 supported
after: Rust toolchain 1.85 or newer required
